title: Senior Fleet Manager at Om Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Om Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
